channel.title: C - Category - OS IS TOO HARD
channel.description: C - Category - OS IS TOO HARD

item.title: 读写结构体
item.author: zxj
item.description: 关于结构体的读写 user space 可以通过fread和rwrite进行结构体的读写。 size_t fread(void *ptr, size_t size, size_t nmemb, FILE *stream) size_t fread(void *ptr, size_t size, size_t nmemb, FILE *stream) ptr − This is the pointer to a block of memory with a minimum size of size*nmemb bytes. size − This is the size in bytes of each element to be read. nmemb − This is the number of elements, each one with a size of size bytes. stream − This is the pointer to a FILE object that specifies an input stream.
